items.name: confirm
items.title: Global Confirm
items.description: A global, stacked confirmation system with a promise-based API and async support.

items.name: inertia-pagination
items.title: Inertia Pagination
items.description: A pagination component optimized for Laravel and Inertia responses.

items.name: server-pagination
items.title: Server Pagination
items.description: A universal pagination component tailored for standard React, Next.js, and TanStack Router, supporting dynamic callbacks and relative SEO links.

items.name: search-select
items.title: Search Select
items.description: A beautiful searchable combobox supporting single/multi selection, custom avatars, description lines, and debounced API searching.

items.name: file-uploader
items.title: File Uploader
items.description: A beautiful drag-and-drop file uploader supporting local accumulation, direct async uploads, image blob thumbnails, and avatar profiles.

items.name: permission-guard
items.title: Permission Guard
items.description: A premium RBAC and wildcard permission gating suite supporting stealth unmounts, visual cloning disable modes, and glowing frosted-glass overlays.
